backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining data types (academic entries, coding challenges, user profiles) and state variables for an academic progress and coding practice application, with access control and blob storage mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—fixing production runtime errors and handling unready backend actors with user-friendly states—to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted reference document summarizing the purpose and key implementation details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport/SEO meta tags and a root div that mounts the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles actor initialization loading/error states, authentication gating, profile setup flow, and routes between Academic, Coding, Data, and User Management modules.
frontend/src/components/AcademicModule.t: Academic module container rendering a six-tab interface (Add Marks, Progress, Subject Analysis, 9-Scale Grades, Combined %, Certificates), with each tab's content wrapped in an ErrorBoundary.
frontend/src/components/AddMarksForm.tsx: Marks entry form supporting all grades with grade/term/stream selectors, Science and Commerce subgroup pickers, board exam mode, elective math selection, and AI substitution preview before submission.
Displays academic achievement certificates with tier levels (platinum/gold/silver/bronze) based on term percentage, with grade filtering and certificate images.
frontend/src/components/CodingEditor.tsx: A Python coding editor component that lets users select challenges, write and run code via Pyodide in-browser, and save attempts with optional scores.
frontend/src/components/CodingHistory.ts: Displays a list of past coding attempts in an accordion UI, showing challenge title, score, timestamp, submitted code, and output.
frontend/src/components/CodingModule.tsx: Container component that wraps CodingEditor and CodingHistory in a tabbed interface with error boundaries.
frontend/src/components/CombinedPercenta: Shows combined academic percentages grouped by grade and stream, computing adjusted and dynamic combined percentages across up to three terms.
frontend/src/components/DataManagement.t: Provides data export (JSON/CSV) and import functionality for academic entries, handling BigInt serialization and conversion.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches rendering errors and displays a fallback UI with a retry button, plus a HOC helper.
frontend/src/components/ErrorMessage.tsx: Reusable alert component that displays error, warning, or info messages with an optional retry button using lucide icons and shadcn Alert primitives.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with an animated heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with app branding, module navigation buttons (Academic, Coding, Data, and admin-only Users), theme toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout handling.
frontend/src/components/LoadingState.tsx: Configurable loading spinner component supporting small/medium/large sizes and an optional full-screen overlay mode.
frontend/src/components/NineScaleGradesV: Displays academic entries converted to a 9-point grade scale with filters for grade, stream, and term, rendering per-subject grade badges for each filtered entry.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Form component that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves it as their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProgressView.tsx: Academic progress dashboard showing line/bar charts of term percentages and summary stats (average, highest, lowest) with a grade filter dropdown.
frontend/src/components/SubjectAnalysisV: Visualizes subject-wise performance statistics (average, highest, lowest percentages) as a grouped bar chart and individual subject cards using computed data from academic entries.
frontend/src/components/UserManagement.t: React component that provides a UI for assigning roles (admin, user, guest) to users by their Principal ID, using the `useAssignCallerUserRole` mutation hook and displaying success/error feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/usePyodide.ts: Custom hook that lazily loads the Pyodide WebAssembly Python runtime from CDN and exposes a `runPython` function that captures and returns stdout/stderr output.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend, including queries and mutations for academic entries, board exam results, grade aggregates, coding challenges, user profiles, and role management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/boardExam.ts: Utility library for board exam calculations, including Grade 10 AI subject substitution logic, total score computation, and encoding/decoding of subgroup metadata strings.
frontend/src/lib/frequencyPolygon.ts: Provides functions to compute frequency distributions of academic entry percentages across 10-point intervals, with helpers to filter by grade and term and to extract unique grades/terms.
frontend/src/lib/gradeCalculation.ts: Exports utilities for converting percentages to letter grades, 9-scale grades, Tailwind color classes, and raw percentage calculations.
frontend/src/lib/maxMarks.ts: Defines grade- and subject-specific max marks configurations and helper functions to retrieve expected max marks per subject key, grade, and term, including stream-aware subject lists for grades 11–12.
frontend/src/lib/percent.ts: Utility functions for percentage clamping, formatting, adjusted term percentage calculation, and dynamic combined percentage across multiple terms.
frontend/src/lib/subjectAnalysis.ts: Computes per-subject statistics (average, highest, lowest marks and percentages) from academic entries, using max marks logic consistent with the progress view.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including known production deployment errors, existing fix features, and a pending backend migration task to handle subgroup field renaming on canister upgrade.
